name: In West Jordan, how to value my broken wrist from work fall?

mainEntity.name: In West Jordan, how to value my broken wrist from work fall?

acceptedAnswer.description: Utah comp: medical + TTD 66% wages + PPI (9% impairment x arm value $60k = ~$5k+) + possible retraining. Total $15k-$40k typical[9]. Key factors: Independent medical exam sets %. Negotiate lump sum.
